en.name: Level 73 — The Redlands
en.shortDescription: A crimson island drowned in darkness and swarmed by entities; only the Silver Castle, under CORAN's protection, offers refuge.
en.atmosphere: Perpetual darkness under a full moon, suffocating black clouds and endless hostile creatures ringing a gothic sanctuary.
en.tips: Sprint straight for the Silver Castle — don't look around or slow down. Bang on the doors for entry. Never use artificial light.
